query: UPDATE ai_assessments SET estimated_parts_cost = ROUND(estimated_cost * 0.6), estimated_labor_cost = ROUND(estimated_cost * 0.4) WHERE estimated_parts_cost + estimated_labor_cost != estimated_cost AND estimated_cost > 0;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute UPDATE ai_assessments SET estimated_parts_cost = ROUND(estimated_cost * 0.6), estimated_labor_cost = ROUND(estimated_cost * 0.4) WHERE estimated_parts_cost + estimated_labor_cost != estimated_cost AND estimated_cost > 0;
